headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 22, 2026**
article:
The Houston Astros suffered a tough loss to the Cleveland Guardians, who took the game 5-8. Angel Martínez led the Guardians' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 1 RBI. Meanwhile, the Cincinnati Reds secured a 12-6 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays behind Elly De La Cruz's big night, with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Wyatt Langford, who was placed on the 10-day injured list by the Texas Rangers due to a right forearm strain. The Philadelphia Phillies also made several roster moves, placing J.T. Realmuto on the 10-day injured list with back spasms and transferring Max Lazar to the 60-day injured list with a left oblique strain.

The MLB trade market was active, with several teams making moves. The Houston Astros traded RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for SS Braden Shewmake. The Los Angeles Dodgers traded RHP Axel Perez to the Baltimore Orioles for RHP Chayce McDermott. The New York Mets traded LHP Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall to Guardians in 5-8 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros suffered a tough loss to the Cleveland Guardians, who took the game 5-8. Angel Martínez led the Guardians' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 1 RBI.

top_news.title: **Reds Rout Rays 12-6 Behind De La Cruz's Big Night**
top_news.summary: Elly De La Cruz led the way for the Cincinnati Reds with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs, powering the team to a 12-6 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays. Chase Burns earned the win with 5.2 innings pitched, 8 strikeouts, and 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Marlins 5-3**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 5-3 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Dustin May earning the win after 5.1 innings of work. Nathan Church led the Cardinals' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Brewers Blast Past Tigers 12-4**
top_news.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers secured a convincing 12-4 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Brice Turang leading the offense with 2 hits, 4 RBIs, and 5 at-bats. Grant Anderson earned the win for the Brewers.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Fall to Marlins in 4-1 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals suffered a 4-1 loss to the Miami Marlins in their recent matchup. Iván Herrera, Agustín Ramírez, Heriberto Hernández, and Javier Sanoja were among the impact hitters for the Cardinals.

top_news.title: **Astros Shut Out Guardians 2-0**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros secured a 2-0 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Yordan Alvarez and Chase DeLauter contributing to the winning effort. Peter Lambert was instrumental in the win for the Astros.

top_news.title: **Rangers Place Wyatt Langford on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Texas Rangers left fielder Wyatt Langford has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right forearm strain.

top_news.title: **Astros Acquire Shewmake in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros have made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring shortstop Braden Shewmake from the New York Yankees in exchange for right-handed pitcher Wilmy Sanchez.
